description_long: This object depicts a small residential property set within a rectangular plot of green terrain, featuring two distinct dark-roofed bungalow structures. The main bungalow is L-shaped, with a prominent roof and several visible entry points, surrounded by paved walkways and landscaped areas. The secondary structure is smaller and rectangular, likely serving as a detached garage or auxiliary building, positioned at the opposite end of the lot. The terrain includes driveways, paths, and subtle landscaping details such as trees and shrubbery, suggesting a suburban neighborhood context. The roofs are pitched and dark, contrasting with the lighter walkways and green lawn. The overall layout is open, with clear separations between buildings and ample yard space.
description: A suburban plot with an L-shaped dark-roofed bungalow and a smaller detached building, surrounded by green lawn, walkways, and landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the L-shaped bungalow in the foreground and the smaller detached building in the background, with visible walkways and landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the plot, the L-shaped bungalow to the left, and the smaller building to the right, with clear separation between structures.
description_view_2: Rear view with the smaller detached building in the foreground and the L-shaped bungalow further back, emphasizing the lot's depth and landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the smaller building to the left and the L-shaped bungalow to the right, with visible driveways and green space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with scattered windows on multiple facades
